title: New Ecommerce Tools: July 1, 2026
description:
This week: new services for autonomous deliveries, reviews, GEO, performance marketing, livestreaming, agentic commerce, digital currencies, product videos, and more.
The post New Ecommerce Tools: July 1, 2026 appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: Klaviyo launches beta for marketing AI agents
description:
Klaviyo is moving two artificial intelligence (AI) agents to public beta, eyeing use cases for marketers. The technology provider said it has built the agents into its customer relationship management (CRM) platform, allowing them to work from the same real-time customer data across marketing and service. The agents moving to public beta are Composer, for […]
The post Klaviyo launches beta for marketing AI agents appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Why Amy’s Kitchen is championing a new certification for non-ultra-processed foods
description: In an interview with Modern Retail, Amy’s Kitchen CEO Paul Schiefer explains how a new Non-UPF Verified certification aims to clarify food processing standards. Here's what it requires.

title: Square launches agentic commerce integrations with ChatGPT, Claude
description:
Payments provider Square has announced integrations with artificial intelligence (AI) platforms, OpenAI’s ChatGPT and Anthropic’s Claude, to help enable agentic commerce. The integrations include an app for ChatGPT and a plugin for Claude. Square said they help sellers to “get discovered and transact at the exact moment customers are making purchasing decisions through AI-powered conversations.” […]
The post Square launches agentic commerce integrations with ChatGPT, Claude appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Report: Friendly fraud on the rise, merchants using AI to mitigate damages
description:
More than eight in 10 retailers have reported an increase in friendly fraud, according to findings in a report from Chargebacks911, which features insights into where artificial intelligence (AI) fits into the prevention. Friendly fraud refers to when cardholders dispute legitimate transactions. Chargebacks911 provides technology for chargeback prevention and remediation. In its 2026 Chargeback Field […]
The post Report: Friendly fraud on the rise, merchants using AI to mitigate damages appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Visa sees AI investments, consumer adjustments supporting economic outlook
description:
As businesses grapple with uncertainty surrounding consumer spending, fuel costs and geopolitical issues in 2026, artificial intelligence (AI) and adjusting consumer habits are fueling optimism for Visa, the company’s economic insights team reported in a mid-year update. The Visa Business and Economic Insights division published findings based on proprietary data from Visa’s payment network and […]
The post Visa sees AI investments, consumer adjustments supporting economic outlook appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: This Is How Marketers Can Use AI Agents for Data Analysis
description: Do you think of tools such as OpenAI's Codex or Anthropic's Claude Code as developer tools, built only for writing software? Not the case. A recent project at SmarterX shows how these tools can be repurposed for one of the most common (and tedious) marketing tasks: making sense of messy data.

title: What are semantic keywords? Here's how to find & use them
description: Every content marketer seems to be asking the same question: Do semantic keywords still matter in SEO in 2026, especially now that AI engines influence traffic and buying decisions?

title: Bogg, on track for record sales, expands into Urban Outfitters and Anthropologie
description: Bogg, known for its colorful and washable Croc-like totes, is entering new retailers like Urban Outfitters and Anthropologie, as sales are on track to surpass last year's revenue high of $140 million.

title: Cloudflare’s new policy pushes AI companies to pay for publishers’ content
description: Cloudflare is giving AI companies until September 15 to separate web crawlers used for search from those used for AI training and agents, or risk being blocked by default on many publisher sites.

title: Amazon settles FTC card fraud case
description: Regulators allege the digital retail giant created a “Kafkaesque ordeal” for ID theft victims trying to obtain records related to fraudulent transactions.

title: [AINews] not much happened today
description: another quiet day.

title: AIEWF Daily Dispatch: Autoresearch and the tension between AI and human agency
description: The software factory vision met resistance today from speakers defending human understanding and control.

title: Nike says it expects $986 million in IEEPA tariff refunds
description: The company said its North America business expects to recover $965 million in tariff refunds from the U.S. government.

title: Indian tech tycoon bets $30M of his own money to build AI alternative to Microsoft Office
description: Neo is Bhavin Turakhia’s fifth venture and his latest involving enterprise software. This time he's taking on Microsoft Office, Google Apps with AI.
